_audit_case: CASE_1: distribution_only, single_column, no copy_to, no REF/ENCL
subj: AUDIT TEST: Distribution Only with Single Column Layout (No REF/ENCL)
body: 1. This is an audit test payload for distribution_only mode with single_column layout.
a. To line should be omitted.
b. Distribution entries should render one per line at left margin after signature.
c. No REF or ENCL blocks should appear; body moves up naturally.
